product_name: Dragon Stars Series - Dragon Ball DAIMA - Vegeta [Mini], 5" Action Figure

bullets: Looks just like the show - Dragon Stars figurse have detailed deco and sculpting to make sure each figure come to life in your hands, and look just like your favorite characters in the anime!
More than Just the figure - the figure comes with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, percect for different poses, battles, and and staged scenes
More than Just the figure - the figure comes with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, percect for different poses, battles, and and staged scenes
20+ points of articulation with the Dragon Stars figures you know and love
content.description: Be the Star of your own Dragon Ball Battles, inspired by the newest movie and limited only by your imagination! Step into the universe of Dragon Ball Super Super Hero with these 6.5" action figures that every fan should have in their collection. Dragon Stars by Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles America are for the fans and look exactly like the characters you know and love, or love to hate. For ages 4 and up.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
